'''chayate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:curatively|curatively]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-y-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:curatively|curatively]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| chayate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:chayate|chayate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:chayatesher|chayatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chayatesherĂ«m|chayatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chayatero|chayatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:chayateshĂ«|chayateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chayateshĂ«m|chayateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichayatero|gokichayatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokichayateshĂ«|gokichayateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichayateshĂ«m|gokichayateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gochayankerom|gochayankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochayankeshĂ«|gochayankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochayankeshĂ«m|gochayankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gochayankeya|gochayankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chayaterom|chayaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chayatemu|chayatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:chayateya|chayateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichayaterom|gokichayaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichayatemu|gokichayatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokichayateya|gokichayateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:chayayate|chayayate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:chayayatesher|chayayatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chayayatesherĂ«m|chayayatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chayayatero|chayayatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:chayayateshĂ«|chayayateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chayayateshĂ«m|chayayateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichayayatero|gokichayayatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokichayayateshĂ«|gokichayayateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichayayateshĂ«m|gokichayayateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gochayayankerom|gochayayankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochayayankeshĂ«|gochayayankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochayayankeshĂ«m|gochayayankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gochayayankeya|gochayayankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chayayaterom|chayayaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chayayatemu|chayayatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:chayayateya|chayayateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichayayaterom|gokichayayaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichayayatemu|gokichayayatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokichayayateya|gokichayayateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:chĂŠyĂŠte|chĂŠyĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:chĂŠyĂŠtesher|chĂŠyĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chĂŠyĂŠtesherĂ«m|chĂŠyĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chĂŠyĂŠtero|chĂŠyĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:chĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«|chĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«m|chĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichĂŠyĂŠtero|gokichĂŠyĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokichĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«|gokichĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«m|gokichĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gochĂŠyĂŠnkerom|gochĂŠyĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochĂŠyĂŠnkeshĂ«|gochĂŠyĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochĂŠyĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gochĂŠyĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gochĂŠyĂŠnkeya|gochĂŠyĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chĂŠyĂŠterom|chĂŠyĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chĂŠyĂŠtemu|chĂŠyĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:chĂŠyĂŠteya|chĂŠyĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichĂŠyĂŠterom|gokichĂŠyĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichĂŠyĂŠtemu|gokichĂŠyĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokichĂŠyĂŠteya|gokichĂŠyĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:chafyafte|chafyafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:chafyaftesher|chafyaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chafyaftesherĂ«m|chafyaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chafyaftero|chafyaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:chafyafteshĂ«|chafyafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chafyafteshĂ«m|chafyafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichafyaftero|gokichafyaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokichafyafteshĂ«|gokichafyafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichafyafteshĂ«m|gokichafyafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gochafyafnkerom|gochafyafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochafyafnkeshĂ«|gochafyafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochafyafnkeshĂ«m|gochafyafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gochafyafnkeya|gochafyafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chafyafterom|chafyafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chafyaftemu|chafyaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:chafyafteya|chafyafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichafyafterom|gokichafyafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichafyaftemu|gokichafyaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokichafyafteya|gokichafyafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
